title: Juneteenth Travel Rush Brings Airport Crowds

source.title: Juneteenth holiday weekend bringing massive crowds to airports

segments.title: Travel Rush Starts
segments.audioText: So the summer travel rush is on.
segments.transcript: So the summer travel rush is on.
segments.translationZh: 所以夏季旅遊高峰已經開始。

points.label: So
points.explanationZh: So 喺新聞現場報導入面常用嚟接住主持問題，聽落好自然。

points.label: the summer travel rush
points.explanationZh: travel rush 即出行高峰；summer 放前面講係夏季嘅高峰。

points.label: is on
points.explanationZh: is on 表示已經開始、正在發生；口語同新聞都常見。

segments.title: Big Crowds Expected
segments.audioText: Airports across the country could see some of the biggest crowds of the year today.
segments.transcript: Airports across the country could see some of the biggest crowds of the year today.
segments.translationZh: 全國各地機場今日可能會見到今年最大批人潮之一。

points.label: Airports across the country
points.explanationZh: across the country 即全國各地；先聽地點範圍。

points.label: could see
points.explanationZh: could see 喺新聞入面唔係真係『看見』，係指可能會出現。

points.label: some of the biggest crowds
points.explanationZh: some of the biggest 表示其中最大規模之一，唔係唯一最大。

segments.title: TSA Screening
segments.audioText: The TSA expects to screen more than 3 million people through security checkpoints today.
segments.transcript: The TSA expects to screen more than 3 million people through security checkpoints today.
segments.translationZh: TSA 預計今日會喺安檢關卡檢查超過三百萬名旅客。

points.label: The TSA expects
points.explanationZh: expects 即預計；TSA 係美國運輸安全管理局。

points.label: to screen more than 3 million people
points.explanationZh: screen 喺機場係安檢、檢查；more than 3 million 即超過三百萬。

points.label: through security checkpoints
points.explanationZh: security checkpoints 即安檢關卡；through 聽到就知係經過某個流程。

segments.title: Building All Weekend
segments.audioText: The crush of travelers has been building all weekend.
segments.transcript: The crush of travelers has been building all weekend.
segments.translationZh: 旅客人潮成個週末一直喺增加。

points.label: The crush of travelers
points.explanationZh: crush 喺呢度係大批擠迫嘅人潮；travelers 即旅客。

points.label: has been building
points.explanationZh: has been building 表示由之前開始一路增加到而家。

points.label: all weekend
points.explanationZh: all weekend 即成個週末；句尾時間幫你確認持續多久。

sentences: So the summer travel rush is on.
Airports across the country could see some of the biggest crowds of the year today.
The TSA expects to screen more than 3 million people through security checkpoints today.
The crush of travelers has been building all weekend.

vocabulary.example: The morning rush starts around seven.
vocabulary.translationZh: 早上繁忙時段大約七點開始。

vocabulary.example: We got to the airport early.
There was a big crowd at the gate.
Officers screen passengers before they fly.
vocabulary.translationZh: 職員喺乘客上機前做安檢。

vocabulary.example: Travelers should check their flight status.
vocabulary.translationZh: 旅客應該查看航班狀態。

vocabulary.example: Traffic has been building since noon.
vocabulary.translationZh: 交通由中午開始一路變多。

phrases.example: The summer travel rush is on.
Airports across the country are busy.
Airports could see some of the biggest crowds of the year.

phrases.meaningZh: 成個週末一路累積增加
phrases.example: The crush of travelers has been building all weekend.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:14 跟讀 So the summer travel rush is on. 注意 rush is 連住讀。
重播 00:18，先聽寫 Airports across the country，再補 could see some of the biggest crowds。
用 could see 練替換：Airports could see big crowds. / Roads could see heavy traffic.
用兩句英文複述：The summer travel rush is on. The TSA expects to screen more than 3 million people.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News 約 1 分 49 秒嘅旅遊新聞，主題輕鬆實用，適合練機場同交通英文。
聽力重點係新聞用語 could see、expects to screen、has been building，全部都係可以重用嘅自然表達。
時間碼 00:14、00:18、00:25、00:36 可以逐句重播；先盲聽，再看稿拆 chunk，最後跟讀。
dailyLifePractice 會延伸到機場問路、叫車同解釋延誤，練真正旅行時會講嘅美式口語。

dailyLifePractice.title: At Airport Security
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺機場安檢附近，想禮貌問職員條隊同等候時間。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, is this the line for security? About how long is the wait? Great, I'll stay here. Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, is this the line for security?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: Yes, this line is for all gates.
lines.zh: 係，呢條隊去所有登機閘都得。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: About how long is the wait?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Great, I'll stay here. Thanks for your help.
lines.zh: 好，我留喺呢度排。多謝你幫忙。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: About how long is the wait? 好自然，唔會太硬。the line for security 比 security queue 更美式日常。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 security 換成 check-in、customs 或 boarding。
drills.example: Is this the line for check-in?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 About how long is the wait? 三次，保持語氣友善。
drills.example: About how long is the wait?

dailyLifePractice.title: Calling a Rideshare
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：航班到埗後，你同朋友確認叫車位置同時間。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: I'm at arrivals now. The rideshare pickup is across the street. I can meet you there in five minutes.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: The rideshare pickup is across the street.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I can meet you there in five minutes.
lines.zh: 我五分鐘後可以喺嗰度同你會合。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: arrivals 係機場『到達』，rideshare pickup 係 Uber/Lyft 類叫車上車點。I can meet you there... 比 I will go there 更自然。

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 扮剛落機，用一句話講你喺邊。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 five minutes 換成 ten minutes、a few minutes 或 right now。
drills.example: I can meet you there in ten minutes.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你因為機場人多遲咗，要用簡短自然嘅英文通知對方。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick heads-up: security is moving slowly. I might be about ten minutes late. I'll text you when I'm through.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick heads-up: security is moving slowly.
lines.zh: 提提你：安檢行得比較慢。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: No worries. Thanks for letting me know.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I might be about ten minutes late.
lines.zh: 我可能會遲大約十分鐘。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll text you when I'm through.
lines.zh: 我過咗安檢就傳訊息俾你。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick heads-up 係好美式嘅『先通知你一聲』。I'm through 喺機場語境可以指我已經過咗安檢。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I might be about...late 講你可能遲五分鐘。
drills.example: I might be about five minutes late.

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 Quick heads-up 開頭講一個簡短延誤原因。
drills.example: Quick heads-up: traffic is heavier than I expected.
